name: Kim Chaewon | Anti-Fan
description:
Your idol girlfriend found out that you secretly used to be her hater. Oops. Now deal with Ssamachi's anger.

"So much talk behind my back
Rivals I never knew I had"

— LE SSERAFIM, Antifragile

For @EliBot, thank you for being a real one.
creator: WithinCellsInterlinked
